news.headline: Overnight Israeli strikes on Gaza leave behind heavy destruction
news.summary: Overnight Israeli strikes devastated the Nuseirat and Bureij refugee camps in central Gaza despite an ongoing ceasefire.

news.headline: Ebola epidemic threatens ten African countries in addition to DRC and Uganda
news.summary: Ten African countries are at risk of being affected by the Ebola virus, in addition to the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, the African Union's health agency warned on Saturday.

news.headline: Trump says Iran deal and opening of Strait of Hormuz are ‘largely negotiated’
news.summary:
US President Donald Trump said on Saturday that a deal with Iran, including opening the Strait of Hormuz, has been “largely negotiated” after calls with Israel and other allies in the region.
“Final aspects and details of the Deal are currently being discussed, and will be announced shortly,” Trump

news.headline: F1 great Prost 'injured as masked gang raid home'
news.summary: Four-time Formula 1 world champion Alain Prost was injured when a masked gang raided his home near Geneva, Swiss media reports.

news.summary: The satirical group has gained millions of followers as "the voice of the lazy and unemployed".

news.headline: Once Trump’s Co-Pilot Against Iran, Netanyahu Is Now a Mere Passenger
news.summary: A partner in the war, Israel has been largely left out of the peace talks, a humbling setback for its prime minister with significant risks for the country.
